Metadata.title: AI Solutions & Workshops for Law Firms - clever.legal
Metadata.description: clever.legal GmbH – We eliminate the bureaucracy of waiting. With algorithmic precision and human excellence, we transform complex legal situations into instant results.
Metadata.ogDescription: With algorithmic precision and human excellence, we transform complex legal situations into instant results.

Hero.leadParagraph: We don't sell software — we sell <emphasis>capacity & time</emphasis>. clever.legal deploys the AI infrastructure that lets you simplify and scale both single mandates and mass proceedings — while your competition is still sorting PDFs.

Problem.compareRow1Left: Juniors read PDFs, the clock ticks, margins shrink.
Problem.compareRow1Right: AI validates. You decide. In seconds, not hours.
Problem.compareRow2Left: Mass proceedings = mass effort. Team doesn't scale.
Problem.compareRow2Right: Mass proceedings without mass effort. Briefs on autopilot.
Problem.compareRow3Left: Client acquisition by flyer and hope.
Problem.compareRow3Right: Performance satellites deliver qualified leads on demand.
Problem.compareRow4Left: 'AI strategy' as a PowerPoint. For 18 months.
Problem.compareRow4Right: 48-hour full integration. We leave only when the system runs.
Problem.compareRow5Right: Capacity per employee × 10. Hiring stays optional.
Problem.footerQuote: — Professional diligence is no excuse for analog inertia.
Problem.pain01Body: Manual case review is uneconomical. Every hour in PDFs is one less hour of strategy.
Problem.pain02Body: Skills shortage stops growth. New mandates need new people — or new systems.
Problem.pain03Body: The competition isn't sleeping. It's already automating. AI FOMO is real.

Engine.module01Desc: OCR extracts core data from client documents in seconds. Contract numbers, amounts, deadlines — structured, validated, archived.
Engine.module02Desc: Finished briefs based on your winning templates. Each client unique, each brief individual — but in minutes, not days.
Engine.module03Desc: Specialized landing pages for your practice areas. Thorsten hunts traffic, Nico builds authority, the funnel delivers qualified mandates.
Engine.module04Desc: 48 hours of full integration. On site. Your team, our system. We leave only when everyone masters the engine.
Engine.barTagline: Intake → Draft → File → Follow-up. One flow. No media discontinuity.

Services.intro: We combine AI expertise, performance marketing, and law-firm know-how into one coherent system. Four services that interlock — so your firm not only works more efficiently but also grows in a more predictable way.
Services.service1Desc: Your team learns not only what AI can do — it learns how to use it confidently in day-to-day legal work. Our workshops are hands-on, tailored to your practice areas, and deliver results from day one.
Services.service1Bullet1: Hands-on workshops on-site or remote — no PowerPoint theory
Services.service1Bullet2: Prompt engineering for legal drafting, contract review, and research
Services.service1Bullet3: Team adoption guarantee: We don't leave until everyone masters the tools
Services.service2Desc: We analyze your current workflows and deploy AI where it has the greatest leverage. No gimmicks, no buzzword bingo — measurably less effort, more capacity, and faster turnaround times.
Services.service2Bullet1: Process audit: We review your workflows and identify automation potential
Services.service2Bullet2: Custom integration of LLMs, OCR, and document AI into your existing infrastructure
Services.service2Bullet3: Scale without hiring: Handle more cases at stable cost
Services.service3Desc: A dedicated, high-converting landing page for each practice area — your 'satellites.' Specialized, SEO-optimized, and equipped with automated funnels that deliver qualified mandates on autopilot.
Services.service3Bullet1: Specialized domains per practice area for maximum visibility and trust
Services.service3Bullet2: Fully automated funnel: From first contact through intake to digitally signed power of attorney
Services.service3Bullet3: Performance-optimized campaigns that cut cost per acquisition by up to 62%
Services.service4Subtitle: SEO · LOCAL SEO · SEM · SOCIAL MEDIA
Services.service4Desc: Visibility is no accident — it's craft. We systematically grow your firm's digital presence with organic reach, paid traffic, and social strategies that build authority and trust.
Services.service4Bullet1: SEO & local SEO: Top rankings on Google — locally and nationally, organic and sustainable
Services.service4Bullet2: Google Ads (SEM): Performance campaigns with a clear ROI and continuous optimization
Services.service4Bullet3: Social media: Content strategies that showcase your expertise and attract clients
Services.engineBarText: Training → integration → satellites → marketing. One ecosystem. No island solutions.

Satellite.intro: Individual landing pages for your firm's focus areas. No boring contact form — a fully automated lead flow that delivers real mandates.
Satellite.flowHeading: From click to power of attorney. Fully automated.
Satellite.flowSubtext: All the preamble disappears. No contact form, no email ping-pong — your client onboards themselves.
Satellite.step1Text: Targeted campaigns route prospective clients to your satellite domain — optimized for maximum conversion.
Satellite.step2Text: The client submits all relevant data in a structured way. No email ping-pong, no phone tag, no waiting.
Satellite.step3Text: At the end of the flow stands the digitally signed power of attorney. Done. Ready to work with immediately.

Cluster.subline: No fork in the road — three clusters.
Cluster.cluster1Lead: From scanning to deciding. Your AI cuts review times by up to 90%. You no longer read PDFs — you validate outputs.
Cluster.cluster1Bullet2: From first contact to complaint in < 5 minutes
Cluster.cluster1Bullet3: Territory and niche protection — 1 partner per region
Cluster.cluster1Bullet4: beA integration, OCR, deadline control on rails
Cluster.cluster2Lead: We eliminate the 'legal department' bottleneck. Automated workflows move standard reviews into real time — not into weeks.
Cluster.cluster3Lead: Satellite domains aggregate affected parties efficiently. Traffic in, mandate out, pleadings automated — the assembly line for access to justice.

Calculator.subline: Time is the only scarce currency.
Calculator.footnote: Assumption: 90% time savings on routine tasks per clever.legal benchmark.

Exclusivity.heading: Exclusivity is our policy.
Exclusivity.body1: We don't scale commodity solutions. We choose our partners deliberately. Per practice area and region, we grant only one license for our engine.
Exclusivity.body2Bold: Secure your market advantage before your competitor does.

NotWhatWeDo.intro: We don't help you cut staff. Our approach goes in a different direction.
NotWhatWeDo.cardTitle: More mandates. Same team. Higher quality.
NotWhatWeDo.cardBody: We help firms scale through time savings rather than headcount — serving more clients with the same team at the same or higher quality.

Contact.chipOnePartner: Only one partner per area of law

ContactForm.successBody: Marc or Nico will get back to you personally within 24 hours.

Alerts.sideBody: Curated early warnings on class actions, regulatory signals, and trends — before the market reacts.

Team.originQuote: 'While we marvel at primate evolution, the German legal system is still stuck in the analog Stone Age.'
Team.originAttribution: — Nico & Thorsten, walk with the Barbary macaques
Team.marcBio: The legal conscience. Showed with zockerhelden.de how to scale mass proceedings.
Team.nicoBio: 25+ years in online marketing. Builds organic authority — against ossified structures.
Team.thorstenBio: Chases traffic on satellites and B2B landing pages. Two decades of paid-media excellence.
Team.christophBio: Thinks in high-performance logic, not statutes. The black box that makes everything possible.

CTA.headline: Ready for the next step?
CTA.body: While others are still clocking in, we've already won. Secure your strategy call now.
CTA.footnoteOnePartner: Only one partner per area of law and region.

Footer.epilogHeadlineLine2Accent: Getting justice can too — from now on.

FuerAnwaelte.metaDescription: The AI infrastructure for the law firm of the future. Review time reduced by 90%, mass proceedings without mass effort.
FuerAnwaelte.heroLead: No consulting. No experiments. We install the AI infrastructure that lets you scale mass proceedings while your competition is still sorting files.
FuerAnwaelte.benefit1Desc: Our AI reduces client document review time by up to 90%. You no longer read PDFs — you only validate results.
FuerAnwaelte.benefit2Desc: Mass proceedings without mass effort. We automate the drafting grind so you can focus on legal strategy.
FuerAnwaelte.benefit3Desc: From first contact to ready-to-file complaint in under 5 minutes. Scale your firm without growing your team.
FuerAnwaelte.engineLead: Four modules that interlock. From case review to client acquisition.
FuerAnwaelte.module1Desc: Automatic extraction of core data. OCR recognition completely eliminates manual data entry.
FuerAnwaelte.module2Desc: Generates finished briefs based on proven winning templates. Individualized — but in seconds.
FuerAnwaelte.module3Desc: Specialized landing pages fill your capacity instantly with qualified clients.
FuerAnwaelte.module4Desc: 48-hour full integration of your team. We don't leave until the system is running.
FuerAnwaelte.ctaHeading: Only one partner per practice area.
FuerAnwaelte.ctaBody: We grant only one license per practice area and region. Secure your market advantage.

FuerUnternehmen.metaDescription: The efficiency engine for your legal department. Lead times halved, bottleneck eliminated.
FuerUnternehmen.heroLead: Consulting and implementation of legal-tech tools for in-house digitalization. We transform your legal department from a cost center into a strategic competitive advantage.
FuerUnternehmen.benefit1Desc: We eliminate the 'legal department' bottleneck. Automated workflows ensure standard reviews happen in real time.
FuerUnternehmen.benefit2Desc: Time is risk. clever.legal digitizes your legal structure so deeply that lead times are halved.
FuerUnternehmen.benefit3Desc: Automated compliance checks and documentation. Systematically reduce compliance risks.
FuerUnternehmen.featuresLead: No cheap SaaS. A massive transformation of your legal infrastructure.
FuerUnternehmen.feature1Desc: AI-powered contract analysis in seconds instead of days. Risks are identified before they become problems.
FuerUnternehmen.feature2Desc: Seamless connection to existing systems. No island solution — deep integration into your process landscape.
FuerUnternehmen.feature3Desc: Dashboard with all relevant KPIs. Transparency on costs, lead times, and risks at a glance.
FuerUnternehmen.feature4Desc: Trained on your industry-specific requirements. No generic solution — your individual competitive advantage.
FuerUnternehmen.ctaBody: Let us analyze where your legal department is losing the most time.

Story.metaDescription: From primates to proceedings. How a walk at Affenberg led to the birth of clever.legal.
Story.heroLead: Most groundbreaking ideas are born in glass-walled conference rooms. Ours started with an attempt to do exactly the opposite.
Story.chapter1P1: Nico and Thorsten just wanted to switch off. No Slack, no LinkedIn, no dashboards. The plan was simple: quality time — a walk with the families in the woods at Affenberg, clearing their heads among the Barbary macaques.
Story.chapter1P2: But fate had other plans. Instead of the hoped-for digital detox, a realization hit like a thunderclap:
Story.quoteText: 'While we're marveling at primate evolution here, the German legal system is still stuck in the analog Stone Age.'
Story.sparkQuestion1: Why does 'getting justice' still take months in a world of real-time data?
Story.sparkQuestion2: Why do highly paid lawyers sift through piles of files while AI can already recognize complex patterns in seconds?
Story.neighborsText: Nico brought Marc on board. The two are friends, practically neighbors, and long-time companions. Nico had built the zockerhelden.de project technically and accompanied it to 'Die Höhle der Löwen' (Shark Tank). Marc, the experienced mass-claims strategist, provided the legal conscience.
Story.techPartnersText: Thorsten brought Christoph on board. The two have been running the agencies OMlocal and OMfire as a seasoned team for years. Christoph is the IT architect who thinks in high-performance, scalable logic — not in statutes.
Story.chapter3Heading: The law firm of the future.
Story.chapter3Lead: Today, with clever.legal GmbH, we combine marketing power, legal excellence, and an IT architecture built on years of shared experience.
Story.ctaBody: The system is slow. We are not.

KiSchulungen.metaTitle: AI Training & Workshops for Law Firms | clever.legal
KiSchulungen.metaDescription: Hands-on AI workshops for law firms. Your team learns prompt engineering, contract analysis, and legal research with AI — productive from day one.
KiSchulungen.heroLead: Your team learns not just what AI can do — it learns how to use it confidently in day-to-day legal work. Hands-on, tailored to your practice areas, productive from day one.
KiSchulungen.benefit1Desc: We don't leave until everyone in the house masters the tools. No PowerPoint theory — only real hands-on practice with your own cases.
KiSchulungen.benefit2Desc: Workshops on-site or remote, precisely tailored to your practice areas. From solo practitioners to large firms.
KiSchulungen.benefit3Desc: Participants report a threefold increase in research speed within the first week after the workshop.
KiSchulungen.modulesLead: Each workshop is individually composed from these four core modules.
KiSchulungen.module1Desc: Build understanding, overcome hesitation. What can AI really do — and where are the limits in a legal context?
KiSchulungen.module2Desc: The art of asking the right question. Specific techniques for contract analysis, research, brief drafting, and client communication.
KiSchulungen.module3Desc: Embedding AI into existing law-firm workflows. From case review to document analysis to deadline management.
KiSchulungen.module4Desc: Data protection, professional regulations, hallucinations — we address the risks openly and show you safe deployment paths.
KiSchulungen.ctaBody: Let us find out in a short conversation which workshop format suits your firm.

KiIntegration.metaTitle: AI Integration for Law Firms | clever.legal
KiIntegration.metaDescription: We analyze your law-firm workflows and deploy AI where it has the greatest leverage. Review time −90%, accuracy 99.4%.
KiIntegration.heroLead: We analyze your existing workflows and deploy AI where it has the greatest leverage. No gimmicks — measurably less effort, more capacity, and faster turnaround times.
KiIntegration.benefit1Desc: Documents that used to take hours are analyzed in seconds. OCR, extraction, and classification run fully automatically.
KiIntegration.benefit2Desc: Our models are trained on legal texts. No generic chatbots — specialized AI for your use case.
KiIntegration.benefit3Desc: Handle more cases at stable cost. AI scales your capacity without burdening your payroll.
KiIntegration.engineLead: From assessment to ongoing operations — a closed integration process.
KiIntegration.module1Desc: We review your workflows and identify automation potential. Every step is analyzed — every time sink flagged.
KiIntegration.module2Desc: LLMs, OCR, and document AI are seamlessly embedded into your existing infrastructure. No media breaks, no duplicate systems.
KiIntegration.module3Desc: Generates finished briefs based on proven winning templates. Individually customized — but created in seconds.
KiIntegration.module4Desc: Dashboard access, performance monitoring, and continuous fine-tuning. Your AI gets better the longer it runs.
KiIntegration.ctaBody: Start with a free process audit. We'll show you exactly where AI has the greatest impact in your firm.

LeadSatelliten.benefit1Desc: Performance-optimized campaigns cut your cost per acquisition by up to 62% below market average.
LeadSatelliten.benefit2Desc: While the industry average sits below 2%, our satellites convert at over 8% — thanks to specialized funnel design.
LeadSatelliten.benefit3Desc: From first contact through automated case review to digital power of attorney — in under 5 minutes.

OnlineMarketing.metaTitle: Online Marketing Services for Law Firms | clever.legal

Datenschutz.label: Legal
Datenschutz.heading: Privacy Policy
Datenschutz.section1P1: The controller within the meaning of the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and other national data protection laws of the member states as well as other data protection provisions is:
Datenschutz.section1P2:
clever.legal GmbH (in formation)
Florianweg 1
88677 Markdorf
Germany
Datenschutz.section1P3: Authorized Managing Director: Attorney Marc Ellerbrock
Datenschutz.section1P4: Hereinafter also referred to as 'we', 'us', or 'clever.legal'.
Datenschutz.section1Sub1P1: clever.legal GmbH is currently in the process of formation. Until registration in the commercial register, the founding shareholders are personally liable. Once registration is completed, the full commercial register details (registry court, HRB number, VAT identification number) will be added to the legal notice and this privacy policy.
Datenschutz.section2P1: The appointment of a data protection officer is not currently required by law pursuant to Art. 37 GDPR in conjunction with § 38 BDSG. For data protection inquiries, please contact the controller mentioned above at:
Datenschutz.section2P3: Once the legal requirements for appointing a data protection officer are met, we will update this privacy policy accordingly.
Datenschutz.section3Sub1P1: We process personal data of our users only to the extent necessary for providing a functional website and our content and services. The processing of personal data regularly occurs only with the user's consent or when permitted by law.
Datenschutz.section3Sub2P1: We process personal data based on the following legal provisions:
Datenschutz.section3Sub2Bullet1: Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR (consent) — insofar as you have given us consent to process your personal data;
Datenschutz.section3Sub2Bullet2: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR (contract / pre-contractual measures) — for processing necessary for the performance of a contract with you or for pre-contractual measures;
Datenschutz.section3Sub2Bullet3: Art. 6(1)(c) GDPR (legal obligation) — insofar as processing is necessary for compliance with a legal obligation to which we are subject (e.g., commercial and tax retention obligations);
Datenschutz.section3Sub2Bullet4: Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR (legitimate interests) — insofar as processing is necessary for the purposes of our legitimate interests or those of a third party and your interests, fundamental rights, and freedoms do not override;
Datenschutz.section3Sub2Bullet5: § 25(1) TDDDG (Telecommunications Digital Services Data Protection Act, formerly TTDSG) — for storing and accessing information on user terminal equipment (cookies, local storage, etc.) based on your consent;
Datenschutz.section3Sub2Bullet6: § 25(2) TDDDG — for technically essential storage/access operations without consent.
Datenschutz.section3Sub3P1: This privacy policy uses terms from European data protection law. The key terms (including 'personal data', 'processing', 'controller', 'processor', 'consent') are defined in Art. 4 GDPR. The current version of the GDPR can be accessed on the website of the European Union.
Datenschutz.section4Sub1P1: We collect and use personal data of our users only to the extent necessary for providing a functional website and our content and services. Processing beyond this occurs only with your consent or as permitted by law.
Datenschutz.section4Sub2P1: Personal data is deleted or blocked as soon as the purpose of storage ceases to apply. Storage may continue if provided for by European or national legislation in EU regulations, laws, or other provisions to which the controller is subject.
Datenschutz.section4Sub3P1: Personal data is only disclosed to recipients to the extent necessary for the respective processing or as required by law. Recipients may include in particular:
Datenschutz.section4Sub3Bullet1: processors engaged by us (especially IT service providers, hosting providers, email providers),
Datenschutz.section4Sub3Bullet2: tax advisors, auditors, and lawyers within the scope of their professional duties,
Datenschutz.section4Sub3Bullet3: public authorities and government agencies where a legal obligation exists,
Datenschutz.section4Sub3Bullet4: banks for payment processing where applicable.
Datenschutz.section4Sub4P1: Personal data is only transferred to countries outside the European Economic Area (EEA) to the extent necessary for the fulfillment of our contractual obligations, required by law, or permissible based on your consent.
Datenschutz.section5Title: 5 · Provision of the website and creation of log files
Datenschutz.section5Sub1Title: 5.1 Description and scope of data processing
Datenschutz.section5Sub1P1: Each time our website is accessed, our system or the system of our hosting provider automatically collects data and information from the computer system of the accessing device.
Datenschutz.section5Sub2P1: The legal basis is Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR (legitimate interest).
Datenschutz.section5Sub3P1: The temporary storage of the IP address by the system is necessary to enable delivery of the website to the user's device. Log files are regularly deleted after no more than 30 days.
Datenschutz.section5Sub4P1: The collection of data for the provision of the website and the storage of data in log files is essential for the operation of the website. Consequently, the user has no right to object.
Datenschutz.section6P1: Our website is hosted by Vercel Inc., 340 S Lemon Ave #4133, Walnut, CA 91789, USA ('Vercel').
Datenschutz.section7Title: 7 · Cookies, local storage, and similar technologies
Datenschutz.section7Sub1P1: Our website uses — where necessary or with your consent — cookies and similar technologies (e.g., local storage).
Datenschutz.section7Sub3P1: When you visit our website, a consent banner informs you about the use of cookies and similar technologies.
Datenschutz.section8Title: 8 · Contact form and contact by email
Datenschutz.section8Sub1Title: 8.1 Description and scope of data processing
Datenschutz.section13Hint: Note: The following sections describe services that are currently not integrated on our website. We include them in this privacy policy as modular placeholders for potential future activation.
Datenschutz.section13Sub9Title: 13.9 Calendar/scheduling tools — e.g. Calendly, Cal.com (not active)
Datenschutz.section13Sub10Title: 13.10 CRM and marketing automation tools — e.g. HubSpot, Brevo, Mailchimp (not active)
Datenschutz.section13InactiveNote: Currently not active. Will be supplemented with full details upon activation.
Datenschutz.section15Sub4Title: 15.4 Right to restriction of processing (Art. 18 GDPR)
Datenschutz.section15Sub8Title: 15.8 Right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority (Art. 77 GDPR)
Datenschutz.footerDate: As of this privacy policy: April 22, 2026

Barrierefreiheit.metaDescription: Accessibility statement of clever.legal GmbH pursuant to the Accessibility Strengthening Act (BFSG) and WCAG 2.1 Level AA.
Barrierefreiheit.scopeP1: This accessibility statement applies to the publicly accessible website clever.legal of clever.legal GmbH (in formation), Florianweg 1, 88677 Markdorf.
Barrierefreiheit.scopeP2: We are committed to making our digital offerings accessible in accordance with the Accessibility Strengthening Act (BFSG), the European standard EN 301 549, and the Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.1 Level AA.
Barrierefreiheit.statusP1: This website is largely conformant with WCAG 2.1 Level AA. In April 2026, we conducted a comprehensive review and revision of all public pages. The following measures have been implemented.
Barrierefreiheit.measure01Item1: The HTML document is marked with lang="de" so that screen readers use the correct speech output.
Barrierefreiheit.measure01Item2: The page uses semantic HTML5 landmarks: header, main, nav, and footer. Screen readers can navigate directly between page sections.
Barrierefreiheit.measure01Item3: A skip link ('Skip to content') is implemented as the first interactive element. It becomes visible on focus and bypasses the navigation.
Barrierefreiheit.measure02Item1: All interactive elements (links, buttons, form fields, sliders) are fully keyboard operable.
Barrierefreiheit.measure02Item2: The global focus indicator is defined as a 2px outline in the accent color (:focus-visible) and visible on all elements.
Barrierefreiheit.measure02Item3: The main navigation and mobile navigation each have aria-label attributes.
Barrierefreiheit.measure02Item4: The mobile menu button includes aria-expanded and aria-controls. The menu closes with the Escape key and focus is automatically moved into the menu when opened.
Barrierefreiheit.measure03Item1: All text-background combinations meet the WCAG minimum contrast ratio of 4.5:1 for normal text and 3:1 for large text.
Barrierefreiheit.measure03Item2: Color is never used as the sole information carrier — severity levels in the alerts table are additionally labeled with text.
Barrierefreiheit.measure03Item3: The accent color (green) on dark background achieves a contrast ratio of approximately 5.8:1.
Barrierefreiheit.measure04Item1: All animations (ticker marquee, cursor blinking, bell pulse, transitions) are completely disabled when the prefers-reduced-motion system setting is active.
Barrierefreiheit.measure04Item2: The typewriter animation in the hero section is displayed immediately as complete text when reduced motion is enabled — with no delay.
Barrierefreiheit.measure04Item3: The ticker is described with role="marquee" and aria-label. The scrolling content is hidden from screen readers via aria-hidden to avoid unnecessary repetition.
Barrierefreiheit.measure05Item1: All form fields in the contact form are associated with visible label elements.
Barrierefreiheit.measure05Item2: The alert subscription modal uses visible labels, aria-required, and aria-describedby to associate fields with error messages.
Barrierefreiheit.measure05Item3: Error messages are marked with role="alert" so screen readers announce them immediately.
Barrierefreiheit.measure05Item4: The subscription modal uses the native dialog element with built-in focus trap and is linked to its title via aria-labelledby.
Barrierefreiheit.measure06Item1: All informative images (team photos, blog covers) carry descriptive alt texts with name and role.
Barrierefreiheit.measure06Item2: Decorative SVG icons are marked with aria-hidden="true" and ignored by screen readers.
Barrierefreiheit.measure06Item3: The logo is implemented as a link with aria-label="clever.legal – Home".
Barrierefreiheit.measure07Item1: The heading hierarchy is consistent: one H1 per page, followed by H2 for sections and H3 for subsections.
Barrierefreiheit.measure07Item2: The audience tabs (cluster selection) are implemented with the complete WAI-ARIA Tabs pattern: role="tablist", role="tab" with aria-selected and aria-controls, and role="tabpanel" with aria-labelledby.
Barrierefreiheit.measure07Item3: Comparison tables (status quo vs. clever.legal, alerts overview) are marked up with ARIA table roles (role="table", role="row", role="columnheader", role="cell").
Barrierefreiheit.measure07Item4: The footer is structured with multiple <nav> elements, each with an aria-label for the category.
Barrierefreiheit.measure08Item1: Recurring links (e.g., 'Open' in the alerts table) have individual aria-label attributes containing the respective context.
Barrierefreiheit.measure08Item2: Blog article links carry aria-label with the article title.
Barrierefreiheit.measure08Item3: Range sliders in the cost calculator use aria-valuetext to read out the current value with unit (e.g., '80 cases').
Barrierefreiheit.limitationsIntro: Despite our efforts, some areas may have limitations:
Barrierefreiheit.limitation1: Third-party embedded content (e.g., external widgets) is beyond our control.
Barrierefreiheit.limitation2: Older blog posts may occasionally contain suboptimal alt texts — we are working on updating them.
Barrierefreiheit.limitation3: PDF documents offered for download may not yet be fully accessible.
Barrierefreiheit.testingIntro: Accessibility was verified through a combination of the following methods:
Barrierefreiheit.testing1: Static code analysis of all public components
Barrierefreiheit.testing2: Automated tests with ESLint jsx-a11y ruleset
Barrierefreiheit.testing3: Manual testing against WCAG 2.1 Level AA success criteria
Barrierefreiheit.testing4: Contrast ratio verification of all color combinations
Barrierefreiheit.feedbackIntro: If you encounter any barriers or have suggestions for improvement, we welcome your feedback:
Barrierefreiheit.feedbackResponse: We will endeavor to respond to your inquiry within 14 days and to remedy any deficiencies promptly.
Barrierefreiheit.enforcementP1: If no satisfactory solution is found after contacting us, you may contact the responsible enforcement body. The competent market surveillance authority of the respective federal state pursuant to § 3 BFSG is responsible.
Barrierefreiheit.footerDate: This statement was created on April 22, 2026, and last updated on April 22, 2026.
